🚨 [HIGH] contoso-web-01 — Endpoint protection missing

📌 Resource Context

  • Type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  • Subscription: 1111-2222
  • Resource Group: rg-web-prod
  • Resource URI: /subscriptions/1111-2222/resourceGroups/rg-web-prod/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/contoso-web-01
  • Recommendation: View in Microsoft Defender for Cloud
  • Owner: alice@contoso.com (graph)
  • Criticality: High

🎯 Blast Radius

  • On 2 attack path(s):
    • Internet-exposed -> lateral move to SQL Server
    • Compromise -> privilege escalation to Subscription Owner
  • Internet exposed — Internet exposure
  • 17 other open recommendation(s) on this resource (3 assigned, 14 unassigned)
  • 8 CVE(s) (max CVSS 9.8)
    • CVE-2024-0001 — CVSS 9.8
    • CVE-2024-0002 — CVSS 7.5

🛠 Recommendation Detail

Install an endpoint protection solution on the virtual machine.

✅ Remediation Steps

Deploy Microsoft Defender for Endpoint via the portal.

📊 Compliance

PCI-DSS 4.0, ISO 27001:2022
